hook_3s: Ever wonder how therapy helps couples? You don't need therapy to use these powerful insights.
script_voiceover: Ever wonder how therapy helps couples? You don't need therapy to use these powerful insights. First, the 'Four Horsemen' framework: avoid criticism, contempt, defensiveness, and stonewalling. Communicate gently instead. Second, Emotionally Focused Therapy teaches us to look beyond surface arguments to understand deeper emotional needs. Ask: 'What am I truly feeling?' Third, Acceptance and Commitment Therapy encourages accepting feelings without judgment and committing to shared values. Want more peace and understanding? Follow us for soft life intimacy tips. These gentle shifts can transform your connection.

cta: Want more peace and understanding? Follow us for soft life intimacy tips.
caption: Discover how adapting simple couples therapy frameworks can bring more peace and understanding into your daily relationship. These gentle shifts are key to a deeper, more connected soft life intimacy. #SoftLifeIntimacy #RelationshipTok #WellnessTok #CouplesTok #IntimacyEducation (AIGC)
topic_seed: Three couples-therapy frameworks adapted for everyday couples
